rows.label: tev013801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev013801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Trevor about the purpose of BLADE.

rows.label: tev013801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev013801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Trevor if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev013801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Trevor for his opinion about you.

rows.label: tev013801_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Trevor for his thoughts on the xenoforms
you saw in Primordial Wilderness.

rows.label: tev013801_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Trevor for his thoughts
on the hostile xenoforms you
saw in Nightglow Forest.

rows.label: tev013801_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask Trevor about the operational
limits of the Lifepoint.

rows.label: tev013801_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Trevor about the Growth's movements.

rows.label: tev013801_SEL0081
rows.name:
Ask Trevor about the damages
suffered in the attack.

rows.label: tev013801_SEL0091
rows.name:
Ask Trevor about the possibility
of a Growth spy in BLADE.

rows.label: tev013801_SEL0101
rows.name:
Ask Trevor for his thoughts
on Lao's betrayal.

rows.label: tev013801_SEL0111
rows.name:
Ask Trevor about the battle
for the Central Life.

rows.label: tev013801_SEL0121
rows.name: Ask Trevor what he intends to do next.

rows.label: tev013801_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Trevor about recent developments.

rows.label: tev013801_SEL3011
rows.name: Ask Trevor about recent developments.

rows.label: tev013801_SEL4011
rows.name: Ask if Trevor has any interesting news.

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0001
rows.name:
The members of each Union have
their own responsibilities, but
mine is primarily guard duty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0002
rows.name:
Lately there have been reports of dangerous indigens
appearing near the entrances to the city. That's why
we've sealed the gates and taken a defensive posture.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0003
rows.name:
We've tightened our guard to the extent
that there's absolutely no chance of
an indigen infiltrating the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0004
rows.name:
But now I hear that Elma and some new
[ST:gender p1=guy p2=gal ] already slaughtered the grex pack that
prowled outside the west gate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0005
rows.name:
So I guess we all ought to
thank Team Elma for their
successful counteroffensive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Carl is pathetic. I put him on
indigen-control duty, and he
hasn't killed a single one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0011
rows.name:
If I didn't have so many damn duties of
my own, I'd march right up to him and
spank him like the insolent child he is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hey, if you're headed that way, could you give Carl
a message for me? He'll be the one loitering out
in front of the arms manufacturers' building.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0013
rows.name:
Tell him to pull his head out and get his goddamn
work done before Trevor has to stick a boot so far
up his ass he'll taste shoe polish for a month.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0020
rows.name:
So when Nagi asked if you wanted to be
a BLADE, you signed up on the spot?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0021
rows.name:
You got gumption, kid.
I'll give you that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0022
rows.name:
You ain't like the new recruits I got under
me. They hemmed and hawed about joining
BLADE until the last possible minute.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0023
rows.name:
You keep that backbone of yours
handy as you go about learning
the ropes, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0024
rows.name: Make me proud, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0030
rows.name:
If everything that "Tatsu"
Nopon said is true, then the
Bias are bad news indeed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0031
rows.name:
Apparently they're indiscriminately
attacking all the native peoples of Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0032
rows.name:
Considering that, Nelson's may not
be the only team that's been hit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0033
rows.name:
Our first step should be gathering
data about their positions and
movements from FrontierNet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0040
rows.name:
If these so-called Growth are part of the group
that destroyed Earth, then we really need to
start operating like it's DEFCON 1 around here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0041
rows.name:
I'm gonna tell the Interceptor to
raise their readiness level, stat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0042
rows.name:
I want you out there in the unexplored areas,
planting data probes like your life depends on
it. We need to get eyes on our enemies ASAP![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0043
rows.name:
Once we have that intel, we can plan
our next move. Godspeed to you, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0050
rows.name:
Elma must really trust you if she
shared that piece of information.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0051
rows.name:
Well, it's true. That number on the top of BLADE Tower
shows how much power the Lifepoint has remaining. In
effect, it shows how much time we all have left.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0052
rows.name:
We have to find the Central
Life before it hits zero.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0053
rows.name:
Otherwise, you and me and everyone else will
just keel over on the spot, and humanity
will be wiped from the universe forever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0054
rows.name:
We don't have much time left,
so expand FrontierNet and give
us a shot at a future![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0060
rows.name:
I can't believe the enemy found
out about the Lifepoint Core.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0061
rows.name:
If they beat us to the Core, they'll
destroy it like they did the last
piece of the Lifepoint they found.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0062
rows.name:
We wouldn't even have a chance to
fight for our lives. All of humanity
would be wiped out in an instant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0063
rows.name:
We're almost out of time. We
have to install as many data
probes as we possibly can.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0064
rows.name:
That's the only chance we have
to locate the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0070
rows.name:
We managed to repel that giant, mostly
thanks to your impressive efforts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0071
rows.name:
I've never been in a battle with
so many casualties before. I lost
multiple members of my team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0072
rows.name:
Damn it all! We have to find the
Central Life and bring back everyone
who gave their lives to protect us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0080
rows.name:
I found it highly suspicious that
the enemy was aware of the operational
limits of our Blue Bloods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0081
rows.name:
That information was known only to those
in leadership positions within BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0082
rows.name:
So it does seem likely that a BLADE has
been leaking information to the enemy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0083
rows.name:
It's an unpleasant matter to discuss,
but we have to find the traitor before
he or she does something irreversible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0090
rows.name:
As the ace of the Pathfinder,
Lao installed more data probes
than anyone in BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0091
rows.name:
Doug wasn't the only one he tricked, either.
He was widely trusted, and his work was held
in high esteem by virtually everyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0092
rows.name:
Dammit! Was everything he did
just a way to sell information
to the Growth?! And why?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0093
rows.name:
Until I hear the reason from his own
lips, I'll never be able to accept this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0094
rows.name:
Bring him back to NLA as quickly as
you can, [ST:playername ]. We're all counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0100
rows.name: I swear on my pride as an Interceptor...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0101
rows.name:
we will escort you safely
to the Central Life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0102
rows.name:
All you need to do is take it back. The
fate of humanity is riding on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0110
rows.name:
We have to use the Central Life to bring
our fallen comrades back to life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0111
rows.name:
And yet, our researchers don't
seem to have made any progress.
Not a single man has been revived.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0112
rows.name:
What's the holdup? Do you
think something may have gone
wrong inside the Lifepoint?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG1059
rows.name:
So miracle of miracles, Carl actually pulled
off the indigen bounty mission I assigned
to him. Even did a decent job of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG1060
rows.name:
If he keeps completing missions like that, he
might actually become a respectable BLADE. ...Best
not count that chicken before it's hatched.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG1061
rows.name:
I've got sharp eyes. I'll
keep looking after the kid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG1062
rows.name:
I'll teach him all the things
I couldn't teach to my own son
that I abandoned on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG2063
rows.name:
I tasked Carl with an
indigen bounty mission...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG2064
rows.name:
But he abandoned the mission. Claimed the
targets were just babies and he didn't have
the heart to kill 'em, or some such nonsense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG2065
rows.name:
He's a BLADE, dammit! Not a nursery-school
teacher! If he doesn't toughen up soon,
I fear for what will become of him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG2066
rows.name:
Damn it all... That side of him
reminds me so much of the son
I left behind on Earth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG3074
rows.name:
I don't think there's a worse
soldier in all of BLADE than Carl.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG3075
rows.name:
But when I talk to him and see that
strange gentleness and rebellious
sense of justice at his core...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG3076
rows.name:
he reminds me so much of the
son I left behind on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG3077
rows.name:
I wasn't a good father to my son.
We weren't even on speaking terms
when I left to come here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG3078
rows.name:
So at the very least, I'd like
to teach Carl everything I'd
have wanted to teach my son.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG3079
rows.name:
But before I can talk to that idiot about
protecting NLA, I have to figure out how
to keep him from getting himself killed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG0087
rows.name:
I have a buddy here named Nathan
that I've known since my army days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG5088
rows.name:
He got ambushed by a super-strong
indigen when he was out on one of
his Collepedian scavenging missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG5089
rows.name:
And one of the younger members of the
team went missing after that. Nathan
was searching everywhere for the guy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG5090
rows.name:
When Nathan finally made it back,
he and I went out drinking for the
first time in a long while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG5091
rows.name:
It made for a night of lively conversation,
now that we both got younger subordinates
making our lives miserable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG5092
rows.name:
When Nathan finally made it back,
he and I went out drinking for the
first time in a long while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013801_MSG5093
rows.name:
We ended up deep in conversation
about the young people in our
lives that are driving us crazy.[ST:wait ]
